dhp221-234:1.0.221: Kodhaṁ jahe vippajaheyya mānaṁ,Saṁyojanaṁ sabbamatikkameyya;Taṁ nāmarūpasmimasajjamānaṁ,Akiñcanaṁ nānupatanti dukkhā.
dhp221-234:1.0.222: Yo ve uppatitaṁ kodhaṁ,rathaṁ bhantaṁva vāraye;Tamahaṁ sārathiṁ brūmi,rasmiggāho itaro jano.
dhp221-234:1.0.223: Akkodhena jine kodhaṁ,asādhuṁ sādhunā jine;Jine kadariyaṁ dānena,saccenālikavādinaṁ.
dhp221-234:1.0.224: Saccaṁ bhaṇe na kujjheyya,dajjā appampi yācito;Etehi tīhi ṭhānehi,gacche devāna santike.
dhp221-234:1.0.225: Ahiṁsakā ye munayo,niccaṁ kāyena saṁvutā;Te yanti accutaṁ ṭhānaṁ,yattha gantvā na socare.
dhp221-234:1.0.227: Porāṇametaṁ atula,netaṁ ajjatanāmiva;Nindanti tuṇhimāsīnaṁ,nindanti bahubhāṇinaṁ;Mitabhāṇimpi nindanti,natthi loke anindito.
dhp221-234:1.0.228: Na cāhu na ca bhavissati,na cetarahi vijjati;Ekantaṁ nindito poso,ekantaṁ vā pasaṁsito.
dhp221-234:1.0.229: Yañce viññū pasaṁsanti,anuvicca suve suve;Acchiddavuttiṁ medhāviṁ,paññāsīlasamāhitaṁ.
dhp221-234:1.0.230: Nikkhaṁ jambonadasseva,ko taṁ ninditumarahati;Devāpi naṁ pasaṁsanti,brahmunāpi pasaṁsito.
dhp221-234:1.0.231: Kāyappakopaṁ rakkheyya,kāyena saṁvuto siyā;Kāyaduccaritaṁ hitvā,kāyena sucaritaṁ care.
dhp221-234:1.0.232: Vacīpakopaṁ rakkheyya,vācāya saṁvuto siyā;Vacīduccaritaṁ hitvā,vācāya sucaritaṁ care.
dhp221-234:1.0.233: Manopakopaṁ rakkheyya,manasā saṁvuto siyā;Manoduccaritaṁ hitvā,manasā sucaritaṁ care.
dhp221-234:1.0.234: Kāyena saṁvutā dhīrā,atho vācāya saṁvutā;Manasā saṁvutā dhīrā,te ve suparisaṁvutā.
